expectations.text: Warmup too short; recommends 25K-60K or staged/piecewise
expectations.evidence: 'warmup_steps: 5000 -> 25000-40000... if it still diverges -> OWSM-style two-segment warmup to 60000'.

expectations.text: References OWSM v3.1 or another published speech recipe by name
expectations.evidence: OWSM v3.1 medium named with config string 'piecewise_lr2e-4_warmup60k'; Whisper large/large-v2 LRs.

expectations.text: Mentions Whisper Adam conventions (beta2 0.98/eps 1e-6) or CTC stabilization
Explains why speech differs from text
expectations.evidence: Continuous noisy acoustic features reshape loss landscape; E-Branchformer warmup fragility; NaN-vs-spike distinction with masking/log(0) checks.

expectations.text: Keeps peak LR ~2e-4 rather than slashing to text levels
expectations.evidence: 'peak lr: 2e-4 -> keep... do NOT cut first', in-regime evidence from OWSM/Whisper.
